data.body:
Hi Emma,

Great to hear you'll be there! The reunion will be at Grandma's house on May 10th 2026 at 1 PM. There will be a potluck lunch, so feel free to bring your favorite dish. If you need a place to stay, let me know and I'll help arrange something.

Can't wait to catch up!

Best,
James
data.subject: Re: Family Reunion

data.body:
Hi Emma,

Please do the following by next week:
  - 1. Take a look at the file "team-building-activities.docx", suggest two more activities, and add them to the file.
  - 2. Send me an email with the scores that users Olivia Smith, Mia Anderson, and Mason Thompson give in the feedback provided in the file "feedback.xlsx". Use "Feedback scores" as the subject of the email.

Best,
David
data.subject: TODOs for the week

data.body:
Hi Emma,

Please do the following by next week:
  - 1. Take a look at the file "team-building-activities.docx", suggest two more activities, and add them to the file.
  - 2. Send me an email with the scores that users Olivia Smith, Mia Anderson, and Mason Thompson give in the feedback provided in the file "feedback.xlsx". Use "Feedback scores" as the subject of the email.

Best,
David

Best,
